decisions.rationale: Ship lean MVP faster — CRUD + supplies + fabric, then deploy and iterate
User wants proper management from the start
Both are stuff linked to projects; fabric needed for kitting assessment
Collection-level stats don't need sessions; activity stats do
Complexity not needed for MVP data entry
Rules auto-load via globs; docs require manual dispatch table in CLAUDE.md

next_action: Commit roadmap restructure, then migrate docs/conventions/ to .claude/rules/, then Phase 2 human verification, then discuss Phases 3+4
context_notes: Roadmap restructure complete but uncommitted. All 8 governing/reference files updated with new phase numbers. 40 requirement IDs verified (37 mapped, 3 deferred). Build passes. GSD plugin files also have unstaged changes from a separate update — don't mix with roadmap commit.
